title: Add Color Paint show, Kid Grove land, Dead Eyes merch booth, Paint & Death food booth, and Obsession Scream haunted house

requirements.text: Add a new kid-friendly show called 'Color Paint' scheduled for 2028 with 5 high-energy characters: Celeste the unicorn, Cosmo the dog, and 3 additional kid-friendly characters. Display in the Shows section with appropriate badge indicating it's a future show.

quotes: Add a new show called Color paint coming 2028 a kid friendly show with 5 different characters from Celeste the unicorn to Cosmo the dog high energy

acceptanceCriteria: Color Paint show appears in shows.ts content with name, description highlighting 5 characters, and appropriate metadata
Show card displays in Shows section with 2028 badge
Characters Celeste the unicorn and Cosmo the dog are prominently featured in the description
3 additional kid-friendly characters are created and included in the show description

requirements.text: Add a new themed land called 'Kid Grove' coming in 2050 with 500,000 square feet. Indicate that Color Paint show will be located in this land. Display as an upcoming expansion announcement.

quotes: add a new land coming 2050 called kid grove and color paint will be in that land 500,000 square feet

acceptanceCriteria: Kid Grove land is added to appropriate content structure with 500,000 sq ft specification
Land information indicates 2050 opening date
Color Paint show description references Kid Grove as its location
Kid Grove announcement is visible in an appropriate section (upcoming features or expansions)

requirements.text: Add a new merchandise booth called 'Dead Eyes' that sells shoes, clothes, autographs, and additional merchandise items. Display in the Merch Shops section.

quotes: add a new new merch booth called Dead eyes have shoes, clothes, autographs and many more

acceptanceCriteria: Dead Eyes merch booth is added to merchShops.ts with name, items list including shoes, clothes, autographs, and additional merchandise
Booth appears in the Merch Shops section grid
Description reflects horror theme while showcasing the merchandise variety

requirements.text: Add a new split-concept food booth combining paint-themed and death-themed cuisine. One side serves paint-themed menu items, the other serves death-themed items. Create complete menus for both sides with creative horror-appropriate food names and descriptions.

quotes: a new food booth a spilt booth of paint and Death
Yea one food booth one side death other side paint and add the menu

acceptanceCriteria: Food booth is added to foodBooths.ts with name indicating split concept
Menu includes distinct paint-themed items on one side with creative names and descriptions
Menu includes distinct death-themed items on the other side with horror-appropriate names and descriptions
Booth description explains the split concept clearly
Booth appears in Food Booths section with appropriate styling
Detail page shows complete menu for both sides

requirements.text: Add a new haunted house called 'Obsession Scream' featuring the character Leslie, a terrifying teen with long purple hair. Create a detailed description for both the haunted house and Leslie's character, emphasizing horror elements appropriate for a teen antagonist.

quotes: a new haunted house called Obsession scream and a new character called Leslie she's terrifying had long purple hair
create a description for her and the haunted house

acceptanceCriteria: Obsession Scream haunted house is added to hauntedHouses.ts with name, tagline, and detailed description
Leslie character is prominently featured in the house description as a terrifying teen with long purple hair
House description emphasizes psychological horror and obsession themes
Haunted house appears in the Haunted Houses section grid
Detail page includes extreme horror warning and guest rules navigation
Leslie's character description highlights her threatening nature and distinctive appearance

requirements.text: Generate an AI image of Leslie character: a terrifying teen with long purple hair in a horror context. Use this image for the Obsession Scream haunted house display.

quotes: add her image she's like a teen
Leslie add her image is AI image

acceptanceCriteria: AI-generated image of Leslie (teen, long purple hair, terrifying) is created and stored in frontend/public/assets/generated/
Image is referenced in generatedImages.ts under haunted houses category
Image displays on Obsession Scream haunted house card and detail page
Image conveys horror atmosphere appropriate for the character

constraints: Maintain existing horror theme and dark aesthetic throughout all new content
Follow established content structure patterns from existing haunted houses, shows, food booths, and merch shops
Ensure all new features integrate seamlessly with current app navigation and routing
Keep backend data models consistent with existing content item types
nonGoals: Modifying existing haunted houses, shows, or food booths
Changing the overall site layout or navigation structure
Adding interactive features beyond standard content display
Implementing e-commerce functionality for merchandise purchases

required: Leslie character portrait: terrifying teen with long purple hair in horror atmosphere, dark background with ominous lighting (leslie-obsession-scream.dim_800x1000.png)
Celeste the unicorn character: kid-friendly colorful unicorn with energetic pose for Color Paint show (celeste-unicorn.dim_600x600.png)
Cosmo the dog character: high-energy kid-friendly dog character for Color Paint show (cosmo-dog.dim_600x600.png)
Dead Eyes merch booth exterior: horror-themed merchandise shop with shoes, clothes, and autograph displays (dead-eyes-merch.dim_800x600.png)
Paint & Death food booth: split design showing paint-themed side and death-themed side in one booth (paint-death-booth.dim_1000x700.png)
